description_long: This is a wooden picket fence composed of evenly spaced vertical slats connected by two horizontal rails. The wood appears weathered, giving it a rustic and natural look suitable for urban parks, gardens, or residential yards. The vertical slats are rectangular and uniformly cut, with the top edge forming a straight, flat line. The horizontal rails are attached to the back of the slats, providing structural support and stability. There are no visible decorative elements or post caps, emphasizing a simple and functional design. The overall construction suggests durability and effectiveness as a boundary or barrier in an urban environment.
description: A rustic wooden picket fence with evenly spaced vertical slats and two horizontal support rails, featuring a simple, flat-topped design.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the thinness of the fence and the alignment of the vertical slats.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the evenly spaced vertical slats and the flat top edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the slim structure and the rails' attachment.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the two horizontal support rails and the attachment points to the vertical slats.
